title: Eye of the Tiger
why_this_song: Eye of the Tiger by Survivor (1982) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 10 times; first heard in: "It's the eye of the tiger"
Appears 6 times; first heard in: "It's the eye of the tiger"
Appears 5 times; first heard in: "Rising up, back on the street"
Appears 4 times; first heard in: "You must fight just to keep them alive"
Appears 3 times; first heard in: "Just a man and his will to survive"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

Rising up to the challenge of our rival

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "tiger" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "tiger" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "it's" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "it's" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Rising up, back on the street
Stalks his prey in the night
Had the guts, got the glory

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Did my time, took my chances
Rising up to the challenge of our rival
It's the thrill of the fight

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask Survivor one question about "Eye of the Tiger", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para Survivor sobre "Eye of the Tiger", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Rewrite the chorus of "Eye of the Tiger" in your own words — keep the meaning but change the style (formal, slang, poetic, whatever you like).
exercises.prompt_pt: Reescreva o refrão de "Eye of the Tiger" com suas palavras — mantenha o sentido mas mude o estilo (formal, gíria, poético, o que preferir).

exercises.prompt_en: If you had to summarize "Eye of the Tiger" in one sentence to someone who has never heard it, what would you say?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você tivesse que resumir "Eye of the Tiger" em uma frase para alguém que nunca ouviu, o que diria?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
